lemon_market_new_listings.description: Fair condition.
The car is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and several small dents. The interior shows wear from regular use. All mechanical systems are currently functional.

This vehicle is in fair condition. It shows visible signs of wear on both the interior and exterior surfaces. The mechanical systems are currently operational, though some components may require maintenance or repair in the near future.

Experience excellence with this incredible vehicle! It is in truly pristine, showroom condition, looking and driving as if it just left the dealership. Meticulously cared for and maintained to the highest standard, this car is a rare find for anyone seeking perfection on wheels.

This vehicle is in fair condition and has served as a reliable daily driver. The exterior shows its age with some minor scratches, a few small dings, and some light paint fading on the hood and roof. Inside, the cabin is clean but shows signs of regular wear, particularly on the driver's seat and floor mats. Mechanically, the car runs well and has been consistently maintained, though prospective buyers should expect the typical maintenance needs associated with its age and mileage. It's a solid, honest car that is ready for its next owner.

This vehicle is in mint condition and presents as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior paint is absolutely flawless, maintaining a deep, mirror-like shine with zero scratches, chips, or imperfections. Inside, the interior is immaculate; the upholstery shows no signs of use, and every feature, from the infotainment system to the climate control, operates perfectly. Mechanically, the car is in peak condition, having been meticulously maintained according to the manufacturer's schedule. It delivers a smooth, powerful, and quiet driving experience. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle in truly pristine, collector-quality condition.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, representing a premier selection for the discerning driver. This model exhibits consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, ensuring a refined and reliable driving experience. Every aspect of the vehicle reflects our commitment to operational excellence and long-term value. Secure a sophisticated balance of performance and prestige with this exceptional offering from our curated inventory.

Hey there! I'm looking to find a new home for my awesome car! It’s been such a reliable companion and is still in really solid shape, ready for all your upcoming adventures. I've taken great care of it over the years, so it runs smoothly and looks great too. It’s perfect for someone wanting a dependable ride without the brand-new price tag. Feel free to reach out if you have any questions—I’d love to tell you more about it!

Offering a mechanically sorted E46 M3 featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies. This driver-focused example has undergone critical preventative maintenance, including a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and rod bearing replacement. The subframe has been professionally reinforced to ensure structural integrity under lateral load. Power is delivered through a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox to a factory limited-slip differential. Suspension geometry is enhanced by Bilstein dampers and refreshed bushings, providing precise turn-in and damping control. While showing minor aesthetic patina consistent with a 'good' classification, the drivetrain remains robust and free of any fluid leaks or timing chain noise. A turn-key performance machine for the discerning enthusiast.
Used car in good condition. Well-maintained. Everything works. Clean title. Ready for pickup.

This meticulously maintained 2017 Audi S5 Coupe represents a fantastic balance of performance and daily usability. The exterior is finished in a striking Moonlight Blue Metallic that retains a deep, mirror-like shine, showing only minor, typical road peppering on the front fascia and a small, professionally touched-up stone chip on the hood. The factory 19-inch 5-spoke Cavo design wheels are wrapped in Continental tires with approximately 70% tread remaining. Inside, the Magma Red Fine Nappa leather interior is in excellent shape, with the bolsters showing only minimal softening and no cracks or tears. Every electronic component, from the Audi Virtual Cockpit to the Bang & Olufsen 3D Sound System, operates as intended. Mechanically, the vehicle is sound, with a complete service history documenting regular oil changes and a recent brake fluid flush. The 3.0T turbocharged V6 engine delivers smooth, consistent power through the Quattro all-wheel-drive system, and the 8-speed Tiptronic transmission shifts flawlessly. This is a smoke-free, garaged vehicle that has been treated with care, offering the next owner a premium driving experience without the need for immediate investment.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally maintained vehicle, representing a premier balance of performance and long-term reliability. This unit has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and interior refinement. With a consistent service history and a focus on structural soundness, this vehicle offers a sophisticated driving experience for the discerning professional seeking both value and distinction.

This vehicle represents a distinguished selection for the discerning driver. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a seamless blend of performance and sophistication. Its mechanical integrity has been thoroughly vetted, ensuring a reliable and refined driving experience. An exceptional value for those seeking a premium automotive standard.

Hey there! I’m looking to find a new home for this absolute gem of a car. It’s been such a reliable companion and is still in really solid shape, both inside and out! It drives like a dream and has been super well-cared for, so it’s ready to hit the road for many more adventures. If you’re looking for a dependable, great-looking ride that won't let you down, you’ve gotta come see this one. Feel free to reach out if you have any questions!

Offering a driver-focused E92 M3 featuring the high-revving S65 4.0L V8 with its signature 8,400 RPM redline. This example has been meticulously maintained with documented rod bearing replacement and updated throttle actuators, addressing the platform's critical preventative needs. The 6-speed manual gearbox provides tactile engagement, while the Variable M Differential Lock ensures precise torque vectoring across the rear axle. The suspension retains its factory damping characteristics, and the hydraulic steering rack delivers unparalleled feedback. While the exterior shows minor stone chips consistent with spirited use, the mechanical vitals are robust. Recently fitted with Michelin Pilot Sport 4S rubber on staggered alloys, this M3 is optimized for immediate performance
Used car. Good condition. Well maintained. Reliable performance. Clean title.

I've made sure to keep up with everything so it's ready to hit the road with its new owner today. Come take it for a spin, you'll love it!

Used vehicle. Good condition. Clean title. Regular maintenance performed. Runs well.

Experience the perfect blend of luxury and dependability with this well-maintained sedan. The exterior features a vibrant paint job with minimal blemishes, while the interior boasts pristine seating and a cabin layout that remains fresh and inviting. Under the hood, the engine runs strong and quiet, benefiting from a documented history of timely maintenance, including recent fluid flushes and a multi-point inspection. The tires have significant tread remaining, and the suspension provides a firm, responsive ride. Every feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the premium sound system, functions exactly as intended. This vehicle has been a reliable companion and is prepared to offer its next owner years of trouble-free service. It is a solid, honest example of the model, ready to drive away today.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive engineering, this vehicle maintains a commendable standard of mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, it offers the discerning driver a harmonious balance of performance and reliability. The interior remains well-preserved, reflecting a history of diligent maintenance. This represents a premier opportunity to acquire a high-caliber vehicle that performs with precision and poise.

This vehicle represents a distinguished opportunity for the discerning driver. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a harmonious balance of performance and reliability. Featuring a refined interior and a robust powertrain, this automobile has been thoroughly inspected to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for mechanical integrity and roadworthiness. An exceptional value for those seeking a dependable, high-caliber driving experience.

Hey there! I'm selling my trusty ride and it’s been such a joy to own. It’s in really solid shape and has clearly been well-cared for over the years. Perfect for someone looking for a dependable car that still looks great on the road. I’m sad to see it go, but I know it’ll make the next owner very happy! Feel free to reach out with any questions.

Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Runs smooth. Clean title.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and presents in impressive, road-ready condition. The exterior retains a high-gloss finish with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with careful use, such as light stone chipping on the front fascia. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean and smoke-free; the upholstery is firm and free of tears, while all electronic features—including the dual-zone climate control and infotainment system—function exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is sound, offering a smooth power delivery and responsive handling. It comes with a documented service history, including a recent oil change and a comprehensive multi-point inspection. This is a reliable, well-cared-for example that balances performance with everyday practicality.

Presented in commendable condition, this vehicle exemplifies mechanical reliability and aesthetic preservation. It has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure peak operational performance. Offering a sophisticated driving profile and a clean history, this selection provides an optimal balance of value and prestige for the discerning driver.
